thought.text: Now let me also check what kinds of types appear in clang's AST:

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "cd /workspace/YatCC && grep -h \"qualType\" build/test/task2/functional-*/*/answer.json build/test/task2/mini-performance/*/answer.json | grep -oE 'qualType[^,}]*' | sort -u | head -40", "security_risk": "LOW", "summary": "Find all unique type strings in clang outputs"}

summary: Find all unique type strings in clang outputs
